name: Nosmo King's Moroccan Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 Large Leeks, white parts only, finely chopped
1 Red Bell Pepper, seeded and diced
3 Carrots, chopped into 1/2 inch pieces (a food processor works)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the orange in half and squeeze out the juice. Set aside.
2. Place 6 cloves into each half of the orange. Set aside.
3. Heat olive oil in a pressure cooker. Add garlic, onions, and leeks. Sauté until leeks are wilted.
4. Add celery, red pepper, carrots, and mushrooms. Sauté for another couple of minutes over medium-high heat.
5. Add stock, tomatoes, coriander, cardamom, cinnamon, lentils, reserved orange juice, and orange halves. Make sure the orange halves are buried in the stew.
6. Lock the lid in place, bring up to pressure. Cook for 11 minutes.
7. Release pressure and season with salt and pepper.
8. Serve over couscous.
